archetype_reasoning: Initially profiled 2026-07-06. 744 resolved geo/elections trades across full history. Iran_ME is the dominant domain: 462 trades, 63% accuracy, 290 contested. Trump_US is a meaningful secondary: 140 trades, 75% accuracy, 73 contested. New trades since Jul 6 (2 additional): 'Will Graham Platner drop out by July 9?' YES @ 0.370 LOST; 'Will Graham Platner drop out by July 10?' YES @ 0.610 LOST. Both are US Elections/political markets (Trump_US adjacent). Two losses on Platner exit markets do not change the archetype — they confirm Trump_US contested-price activity but are thin data (2 trades, 1 candidate). Last 10 overall accuracy = 40% (4/10), triggering a performance deterioration flag (thin data — 2 new trades only). The underlying Iran_ME domain strength (63% on 462 trades) is unchanged by this thin delta. Archetype DOMAIN_SPECIALIST maintained at MEDIUM confidence. Still awaiting mandatory human review before STR-003 promotion.
